heading: National Sex Offender Registry
label: 20921 National Sex Offender Registry
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 16919 of Title 42

children.heading: Internet
children.label: a Internet
children.text: The Attorney General shall maintain a national database at the Federal Bureau of Investigation for each sex offender and any other person required to register in a jurisdiction’s sex offender registry. The database shall be known as the National Sex Offender Registry.

children.heading: Electronic forwarding
children.label: b Electronic forwarding
children.text: The Attorney General shall ensure (through the National Sex Offender Registry or otherwise) that updated information about a sex offender is immediately transmitted by electronic forwarding to all relevant jurisdictions.
